programme.title: ⭐⭐ 2.6m @ 12s OFFSHORE
programme.desc:
With that offshore wind and 2.6m swell, Ribeira might just cough up something rideable before the tide changes, or breaks my ribs.
🌊 Swell: 2.6m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 18.0km/h NE (OFFSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 40.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.1m
📋 Clean conditions with offshore wind

programme.title: 🌊 2.3m @ 12s CROSS
programme.desc:
With 2.3m and onshore breeze, Supertubos will likely be a bumpy washing machine today.
🌊 Swell: 2.3m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 12.0km/h NNW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 22.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m

programme.title: 🌊 2.3m @ 12s CROSS

programme.title: 🌊 2.3m @ 12s CROSS
programme.desc:
Two-point-three meters with that wind? Best to watch the kite surfers eat it today.
🌊 Swell: 2.3m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 12.0km/h NNW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 22.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m

programme.title: 🌊 2.3m @ 12s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
With 2.3m and onshore wind, today's session will likely involve more duck diving than riding.
🌊 Swell: 2.3m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 12.0km/h NNW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 22.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m

programme.title: 🌊 2.3m @ 12s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
That 2.3m swell with onshore wind sounds like a good day to practice duck diving... repeatedly.
🌊 Swell: 2.3m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 12.0km/h NNW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 22.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m

programme.title: 🌊 2.3m @ 12s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
That 2.3m swell will be a washing machine special thanks to that onshore breeze; save your energy for tomorrow.
🌊 Swell: 2.3m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 12.0km/h NNW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 22.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m

programme.title: 🌊 2.3m @ 12s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
With that onshore breeze and 2.3m swell, Lagide will be mostly closeouts with a side of sand in every crevice.
🌊 Swell: 2.3m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 12.0km/h NNW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 22.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m

programme.title: 🌊 2.3m @ 12s CROSS
programme.desc:
With 2.3m of swell and that crosswind, today will either be a closeout clinic or a masterclass in survival.
🌊 Swell: 2.3m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 15.0km/h N (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 32.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.4m

programme.title: 🌊 2.1m @ 12s CROSS
programme.desc:
The 2.1m swell with that wind? You'll be fighting more chop than barrel today, enjoy the swim.
🌊 Swell: 2.1m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 16.0km/h N (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 28.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.4m

programme.desc:

programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 2.1m @ 12s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
